scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/daemon && npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui && npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/website
scripts.test: npm run test:workspaces && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:workspaces: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:daemon && npm run test:desktop-ui && npm run test:website
scripts.test:mac-native: node ./scripts/swift-package.mjs test --package-path apps/shared/ChillClawKit && node ./scripts/swift-package.mjs test --package-path apps/macos-native
scripts.dev:daemon: npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run dev --workspace @chillclaw/daemon
scripts.dev:ui: npm run build --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run dev --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/contracts && npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/daemon && npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/desktop-ui && npm run lint --workspace @chillclaw/website
